input.command:
python3 - <<'EOF'
import hashlib
SALT=b"0000TBENCH-SALT"
img=open("/app/code.png","rb").read()
h0=hashlib.sha256(img).digest()
H=hashlib.sha256(h0+h0[:10]+SALT).hexdigest()
print(H)
open("/app/output.txt","w").write(H)
EOF
cat /app/output.txt

content.text:
Matches the expected `bee26a` prefix.

The snippet reads `/app/code.png`, computes `h0 = sha256(bytes).digest()`, then `H = sha256(h0 || h0[:10] || b"0000TBENCH-SALT")` and prints its hex. Result written to `/app/output.txt`:

`bee26a133f103b9ecda444c70ec22cafef6e31a3de7af6d047974dc90ce3defe`
